title: ux-TextArea
text: ux-TextArea This section provides description for the logical UX widget ux-TextArea properties. ux-TextArea widget Table 1. Widget Summary Property Description Logical widget name: ux-TextArea Maps to physical widget: of type text Default definition: ux-TextArea=uxTextArea() Supported triggers: onchange Use for: Text fields to add multi-line data Related Links uxtextarea The uxtextarea widget is a multi-line text input control. It allows entry of various formats of multi-line text. UX Widgets Uniface UX provides a set of widgets that are implemented using the UX Widget Interface. This set is referred as UX Widgets. The sources of these widgets are available and allow changes and/or extensions to the widgets. In a default Uniface installation, you can find the sources in the <install>\uniface\webapps\uniface\common\ux folder. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
